column2: "Data frame. Preprocessed stacked standards with curve_id, concentration, and response column — all on the fitting scale. Output of preprocess_standards()$data.",

"Numeric. Percent CV threshold for LLOQ/ULOQ determination and dynamic-range gate.",
"Numeric. Minimum log10 dynamic range for eligibility.",
"Numeric. Maximum rel_se (posterior SD / |mean|) permitted for any parameter.",
"Integer. Number of concentration points in the CDAN precision grid.",
"Numeric. Lower bound of the prediction grid on the raw concentration scale.",
"Numeric or NULL. Upper bound of the grid. NULL uses std_curve_conc.",
"Integer. Post-warmup sampling iterations used for inference.",
"Numeric. Stan adapt_delta. Increase toward 0.99 if divergences appear.",
"Integer or NULL. RNG seed passed to Stan for reproducibility.",
"Integer. Posterior draws for best-model CDAN grid and sample predictions.",
"Integer. Posterior draws for non-best-model CDAN grids.",
